rulings.Case Title: JOSE MERINO VS. SAXON MORTGAGE, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 13, 2012, line 1. PLAINTIFF JOSE MERINO's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint. Continued to MAR-27-2012. Parties to comply with San Francisco Local rule 2.6B. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FERMIN SOLIS ANIEL et al VS. T.D. SERVICE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 13, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFFs FERMIN ANIEL, ERLINDA ANIEL and MARC ANIEL's DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overruled, denial and affirmative defenses sufficient set forth. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JENNY KWRONG VS. LARRY VON MILLER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 13, 2012, line 3. Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction. Grant, subject to opposition. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EVANS PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. GUSTAVO RIOS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Compel Discovery And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 13, 2012, line 11. DEFENDANT GUSTAVO RIOS' Motion To Compel Discovery And For Sanctions. Off calendar, untimely, i.e., only 4 days notice. Filed MAR-09-2012 for hearing MAR-13-2012. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ADA DISON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgemtn And Recall Writ Of Possession; Memo Of P&A; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 13, 2012, line 10. DEFENDANT ADA DISON's Motion To Vacate Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession. Grant, subject to opposition. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION VS. STEVEN SOSA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 13, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT STEVEN SOSA's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Deny, no excusable neglect. Not tennant but former trustor. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 26 JOICE, LLC VS. MITCHELL HONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 13, 2012, line 9. PLAINTIFF 26 JOICE, LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Deny. Motion for Summary Judgment fails to shift burden, no evidence re possession. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HAWK LOU VS. SARA POWELL et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 13, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT SARA POWELL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overruled, compliant adequately pleads facts and is not ambiguous. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA N.A., VS. JOSE MUNGUIA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 13, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT JENNY PEREZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to MAR-20-2012, opposing party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B and provide court with copy of opposition by MAR-14-2012 4PM. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHAOXIONG LUO VS. OLGA HURTADO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 13, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANTs OLGA HURTADO, MARTHA HURTADO and DANIELLE GUNTER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overruled, Plaintiff not asking for attorney fees therefore irrelevant; date of rent increase or lack of therefore, complaint for "OMI" does not render uncertain. Defense counsel to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C in future. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FOLSOM DORE ASSOCIATES LP VS. FRED LEACH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment And To Recall Writ Of Possession And Set Case For Trial; Supporting Exhibits
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 13, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANT FRED LEACH's Amended Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment And To Recall Writ Of Possession And Set Case For Trial. Hearing required. (501/REQ)
